CSorro OS

The operating system for creative businesses.

One private-by-default home for projects, people, tasks, assets, chat, whiteboards and production decisions.

CSorro OS shows what matters, what is waiting and what to do next.

Workspaces4 hubs

Separate companies, teams or clients.

Waiting3 approvals

Artwork, app review and project brief.

CORE RecommendationKeep internal work private. Publish only what you choose.
1Mission Control across every company and project
PrivateWorkspaces stay hidden unless you publish a showcase
All-in-oneTasks, chat, assets, notes and whiteboards in each project
NetworkOptional creator profiles, posts, portfolios and hiring

Why it exists

Creative work should not live across six disconnected tools.

Discord for chat. Trello for tasks. Miro for whiteboards. Google Drive for files. Notion for notes. Calendar for deadlines. CSorro OS brings those moving parts into one calm operating system.

WorkspacesOne private hub per company, client or organisation.
ProjectsTasks, chat, whiteboard, assets, knowledge, calendar and activity in one place.
PeopleInvite team members, freelancers, editors, artists, developers and guests with clear access.
ShowcasePublish only what you choose: portfolio, careers, selected projects or public profile.

How it helps

From idea to delivery, every project has a home.

01

Create a Workspace

Separate each company, creator, client or team so the right people only see the right work.

02

Build Projects

Give every production its own tasks, chat, files, notes, calendar, approvals and whiteboard.

03

Assign People

Add editors, artists, developers, builders or guests to the exact workspace or project they need.

04

Let CORE Prioritise

See what is due, what is blocked, who is waiting and what needs attention next.

Privacy by default. Visibility by choice.

Your internal work stays private. Your public showcase is controlled.

A company can run everything internally without being listed anywhere. A creator can turn on public profile mode, post availability, showcase work and receive project invites.

Workspace Showcase

Choose whether to show logo, description, portfolio, careers, contact form, selected projects or team members.

Creator Profiles

Editors, artists, developers and builders can publish portfolios, skills, availability and verified project credits.

Network Posts

Post updates, open-for-work notices, hiring posts, product updates and showcase images that link back to profiles or workspaces.

Built for real production

Less switching. More moving forward.

CSorro OS is for teams who are tired of chasing updates through chats, docs, folders, boards and calendars. The aim is simple: open one system and know exactly what matters.

Open OS PreviewWhy Cristian built it
